verification_sources.name: Official government sources
verification_sources.use_for: official names, flags, national days, symbols

verification_sources.name: WHO
verification_sources.use_for: WHO membership and official reference where needed

verification_sources.name: Authoritative encyclopedic references
verification_sources.use_for: stable background when official sources are unavailable

current_data_policy: For current leaders, population, organization membership, and current-year holidays, verify with current authoritative sources before answering.
no_guessing_policy: If the module cannot verify a field, mark it pending verification instead of inventing.
